globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: fullscreen=(); payment=(); camera=(); microphone=(); geolocation=(); interest-cohort=()
